玉.origin: A king 王 holding one extra dot 丶 — a precious piece of jade so special it gets its own sparkle.

sentence.en: This piece of jade is very beautiful.

异.origin: Two hands 廾 lifting something up to show it off — it looks different and strange from everything else.

sentence.en: He has a strange idea.

智.origin: Knowing 知 something as clearly as the bright sun 日 — that clear knowing is wisdom.

sentence.en: He is a very wise person.

及.origin: Picture a hand 又 reaching out to catch a person running away — stretching to reach and extend.

sentence.en: We reached the station in time.

豚.origin: A bit of flesh ⺼ next to a pig 豕 — a plump little suckling pig.

sentence.en: The dolphin swims in the water.

熊.origin: A strong, able 能 animal standing on four fiery dots 灬 for paws — that's a big bear.

sentence.en: The big bear sleeps under the tree.

鲨.origin: A fish 鱼 that swims through sand 沙 at the bottom of the sea — the speedy shark.

sentence.en: The shark swims very fast.

透.origin: Walking 辶 right through something pretty 秀 — passing all the way through, see-through clear.

sentence.en: Glass is transparent.

担.origin: A hand 扌 carrying a load while the sun rises 旦 — you carry and bear the weight.

sentence.en: Mom worries about me a lot.

撞.origin: A hand 扌 and a child 童 rushing about — bump! That's how you crash and collide.

sentence.en: He accidentally bumped into the door.

鲸.origin: A fish 鱼 as big as a capital city 京 — the giant whale of the sea.

sentence.en: The whale is the biggest animal.

尾.origin: Soft fur 毛 hanging behind a body 尸 — that wiggly part is the tail.

sentence.en: The puppy's tail is very long.

溅.origin: Water 氵 jumping up in tiny drops — splash! It sprays everywhere.

sentence.en: The car splashed water all over me.

肚.origin: A piece of flesh ⺼ shaped like a mound of earth 土 — your round, full belly.

sentence.en: My belly is hungry.

埋.origin: Earth 土 piled over a village 里 — you cover something with soil to bury it.

sentence.en: The puppy buries its bone.

挖.origin: A hand 扌 scooping out a hollow 穵 in the ground — that's how you dig.

sentence.en: They dig a hole on the beach.

遍.origin: Walking 辶 over every flat 扁 place — going all over, everywhere.

sentence.en: Flowers are all over the park.

庄.origin: A house 广 sitting on the earth 土 — a little home in a country village.

sentence.en: I live in a small village.

产.origin: Think of something new coming out from under a roof 亠 — to bring forth and produce.

sentence.en: This factory produces toys.

量.origin: The sunrise 旦 over a measured field 里 — counting how much there is to measure.

sentence.en: Please measure your height.

粮.origin: Good 良 rice 米 stored away — that's your food and grain.

sentence.en: The farmers grew lots of grain.

勤.origin: Strong muscle 力 working with great effort 堇 — a hardworking, diligent helper.

sentence.en: She is a hardworking child.

巨.origin: A hand holding a big carpenter's square — used to make things gigantic and huge.

sentence.en: The elephant has a huge body.

围.origin: A wall 囗 going all the way around 韦 — it surrounds and encircles.

sentence.en: Everyone gathers around to play.

禁.origin: A forest 林 by an altar 示 — a sacred place where some things are forbidden.

sentence.en: Smoking is forbidden here.

私.origin: Grain 禾 kept just for oneself 厶 — something private and personal.

sentence.en: This is my personal thing.

愿.origin: A heart 心 sitting under a hillside spring 原 — your deepest wish and desire.

sentence.en: I am willing to help you.

必.origin: A heart 心 with a line slicing through it — when your heart is set, it surely must be.

sentence.en: We must go home on time.

须.origin: Three strands of hair 彡 growing on a head 页 — the beard on a chin.

sentence.en: You need to drink more water.

拆.origin: A hand 扌 pushing apart 斥 — to break open and take something to pieces.

sentence.en: He opened up the gift.

亡.origin: A roof 亠 hiding a hidden shape — picture someone lost from sight, gone away.

sentence.en: His kitten died.

牢.origin: A cow 牛 kept safe under a roof 宀 — a pen or stable that holds tight.

sentence.en: Please shut the door tight.

屋.origin: Stop and arrive 至 under a roof 尸 — a cozy house to live in.

sentence.en: It is warm inside the house.

修.origin: A person tidying with strokes like neat hair 彡 — fixing and grooming things to study and improve.

sentence.en: Dad is repairing the bicycle.

邻.origin: An order 令 next to a little town 阝 — the people living right next door, your neighbors.

sentence.en: My neighbor is very friendly.

劝.origin: A gentle hand 又 plus strength 力 — using kind words to advise and persuade.

sentence.en: Mom advised me to sleep early.

丢.origin: A piece of jade 玉 with a little 厶 slipping off the top — oops, you lost it!

sentence.en: I lost my pencil.

拔.origin: A hand 扌 gripping and yanking 犮 — to pull out and uproot.

sentence.en: He pulled out a radish.

盼.origin: An eye 目 split 分 between waiting and watching — gazing and hoping for something.

sentence.en: I am hoping for the holidays.

秧.origin: Young rice 禾 right in the center 央 of the field — tiny green sprouts.

sentence.en: The field is full of rice seedlings.
